name: NMI Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I See the Glossary of Abbreviations and Acronyms for descriptions of terms used through this annual report. General We provide mortgage insurance (referred to as mortgage insurance or MI) through our wholly-owned insurance subsidiaries, NMIC and Re One. NMIC and Re One are domiciled in Wisconsin and principally regulated by the Wisconsin OCI. NMIC is our primary insurance subsidiary, and is approved as an MI provider by the GSEs and is licensed to write MI coverage in all 50 states and D.C....
